items.creator: 开普勒
items.title: Advanced AstroCartoGraphy: Returns, Solar Arcs & Rectification
items.summary:
Discover how planetary returns, solar arcs, rectification, and AstroCartoGraphy combine to reveal when and where important life events unfold. Kenan Yasin introduces Kepler College's upcoming AM210 course on advanced predictive AstroMapping techniques.

This session explores advanced predictive astrology techniques including planetary returns, solar returns, lunar returns, solar arcs, and rectification, with a special focus on how timing and geographic location interact in AstroCartoGraphy. Throughout the discussion, Kenan demonstrates how astrologers can combine natal charts, transits, and mapping techniques to better understand life events, personal growth, and relocation influences. Real-world examples featuring Barack Obama and Princess Diana are used to illustrate concepts such as Jupiter returns, Mercury/IC lines, traveling to a solar return ACG line, and the importance of precise coordinate systems in astrological interpretation.

Cindy McKean and Kenan also discuss the technical and philosophical foundations of AstroCartoGraphy, including the distinction between celestial longitude and right ascension, the role of environmental influences in chart interpretation, and how modern astrologers can integrate predictive techniques into practical consulting work.

This video also describes Solar Returns, Lunar Returns, Venus Returns, and Jupiter Returns in AstroCartoGraphy. The upcoming AM210 course will include instruction on Planetary Returns and Solar Arcs. Additional guest instruction will feature Cindy McKean and Carol Tebbs, specializing in rectification, with Isil Karabalut serving as Teaching Assistant for the course.  For more information: Cindy McKean — www.CindyMcKean.com Kenan Yasin Bölükbaşı — www.KenanYasin.com

To join the class 'AstroMapping Advanced Predictive Techniques: Returns, Solar Arcs, & Rectification', visit: https://store.keplercollege.org/product/astromapping-advanced-predictive-techniques-returns-solar-arcs-rectification/

#AstroCartoGraphy #AstroMapping
#LocationalAstrology #PlanetaryReturns
#KeplerCollege

Chapters:

00:00 Introduction
00:08 Introduction to the Course and AM210
04:27 Astro Mapping Techniques and Philosophy
14:47 Understanding Returns (Solar, Lunar, and Planetary)
38:48 Example: Barack Obama's Solar Return and Election
53:43 Lunar and Jupiter Return Cycles
1:06:19 Solar Arcs and Predictive Astro Mapping
1:10:44 Example: Princess Diana's Chart and Rectification
1:20:43 Conclusion and Course Details
1:23:20 Conclusion


Recorded 2026

Opinion Disclaimer: All views expressed by the host and the guest(s) are solely theirs and may not reflect the views of Kepler College. Please keep your comments respectful. Thank you.

items.creator: Helena Woods
items.title: Uranus Lines are DISRUPTIVE to say the least (astrocartography travel stories)
items.summary:
🔗 Connect with Helena (and join my free broadcast channel "astrotravelers":
→ Instagram: @mshelena woods https://www.instagram.com/mshelenawoods

🩷 Join my most popular flagship Locational Astrology Course here: https://helenawoods.com/relocation-astrology

🪐 Subscribe to my astrocartography podcast COSMIC COMPASS for weekly astrology episodes (on Spotify / Apple podcasts): https://helenawoods.com/podcast

🪩 Get my astrocartography cheat sheet so you can understand your map - https://helenawoods.com/cheatsheet

💡 Astrology COURSES with Helena 
https://helenawoods.com/courses

ABOUT HELENA WOODS
Hey there, I'm Helena!  I'm a passionate Hellenistic astrologer and astrocartographer, in love with reflecting light into our human experience. Originally from San Diego, I now call France my home on my Venus line. I'm here to give grounded guidance on astrocartography, after having lived around the globe and studied astro maps since 2018. Currently traveling the world full-time as I do astrocartography work, I also teach on the subject in my locational astrology course programs, and I offer personalized one on one readings in locational astrology. Since opening my consultations in 2021, I've helped over 2,500 kindred spirits find their best places in the world. I've been featured in The Economist, Elle Magazine, Conde Naste Traveller, Business Insider, BBC, The Times, Pop Sugar, Buzz Feed, The Astrology Podcast, Well + Good and have taught over 1,500 students in my courses.

I believe that our intuition is our greatest guide. My goal being online is to inspire you to trust your inner voice and create a magical life in a place you LOVE! ☀️ 

Have a magical day 🦋

 #astrocartography #astrology

items.creator: 占星播客
items.title: Thema Mundi: How the Planets Came to Rule Two Zodiac Signs
items.summary:
This is an animation of an ancient Persian myth about how the traditional planets came to rule two signs of the zodiac in astrology. 

The narration and script with some embellishments on the original story are by Chris Brennan, and the animation was done by Jack Cusumano.

The original myth is preserved in Codices Vaticani 15, fol. 229, edited in CCAG 5, pt. 2 pp. 130-37 by I. Bidez, privately translated by Demetra George.
